nota: Este arquivo contém exemplos de prompts JSON para os truques mais populares do catálogo. Use estes como templates para criar os demais 50+ truques seguindo a mesma estrutura.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog facing a trainer who is holding a treat at the dog's nose level, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot establishing the starting position

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer moves the treat from the dog's nose up and back over its head, causing the dog's rear end to lower to the ground, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Smooth luring motion showing the treat path and the dog's body following

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog's bottom touches the ground in a perfect sit position, the trainer says 'Sim!' and gives the treat, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow-motion of the successful sit with a sparkle effect on the reward

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer now uses just a hand signal (empty hand moving up) and says 'Senta', the dog sits without the lure, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Clear shot of the hand signal and the dog's immediate response

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog sitting perfectly with text overlay: 'Senta: O Comando Fundamental', 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Professional final frame with text animation

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog in a sit position, trainer holding a treat near its nose, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot establishing the starting position

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer slowly lowers the treat straight down to the ground between the dog's front paws, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Smooth downward luring motion

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog follows the treat down, lowering its chest and elbows to the ground in a perfect down position, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow-motion capture of the dog lowering into position

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer says 'Sim!' and gives the treat, then introduces the word 'Deita', 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Reward moment with sparkle effect

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog in a relaxed down position with text overlay: 'Deita: A Base da Calma', 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Professional final frame with text animation

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog standing, trainer holding a treat near its nose, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot establishing position

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer moves the treat in a horizontal circle around the dog's head, luring it to spin 360 degrees, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Circular camera movement following the treat path

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog completes the full spin, trainer says 'Sim!' and rewards, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Top-down shot capturing the complete spin with celebration graphics

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer uses an empty hand with a circular motion and says 'Gira', dog spins without lure, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Clear shot of hand signal and dog's response

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of dog spinning gracefully in slow-motion with text: 'Gira: O Giro da Alegria', 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Cinematic slow-motion with artistic lighting

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog holding a favorite toy in its mouth, trainer praising enthusiastically, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot focusing on positive association

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer gently takes the toy, says 'Sim!', gives treat, then immediately returns the toy, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Close-up on the exchange showing the positive reinforcement loop

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer tosses the toy 2 feet away, dog retrieves and brings it back, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Camera follows the short retrieval sequence

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer tosses the toy further, dog enthusiastically runs, retrieves, and returns, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Dynamic tracking shot following the dog's run

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of dog bringing newspaper to owner with text: 'Buscar: O Ajudante Perfeito', 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Heartwarming practical application shot
